decks.notes: This Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful spells. By utilizing cards like Necrodominance, Soul Spike, and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. In addition to its aggressive creatures like Boggart Trawler and Graveyard Trespasser, the deck also includes disruption spells like Inquisition of Kozilek and Shadow of Doubt to control the opponent's hand and resources. With a mix of creature aggression and spell disruption, this deck seeks to maintain pressure and control throughout the game.

The deck revolves around assembling UrzaTron lands (Urza's Tower, Power Plant, Mine) to ramp up mana for powerful Eldrazi creatures like Ulamog and Emrakul. It also utilizes control elements like Karn and Thought-Knot Seer to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck includes utility cards like Expedition Map and Mind Stone for consistency and card advantage. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with big threats while controlling the board with removal spells and disruptive abilities, ultimately leading to victory through a combination of powerful creatures and strategic plays.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain control over the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy and using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and powerful creatures to dominate the battlefield. The deck utilizes a mix of versatile spells like Counterspell, Fatal Push, Force of Negation, and Sink into Stupor to handle threats efficiently. With powerful creatures like Quantum Riddler, Psychic Frog, and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian, the deck can generate card advantage and pressure the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to control the game's pace and win through attrition and strategic plays.

The deck focuses on using a combination of cards that mill the opponent's library quickly while disrupting their game plan. Cards like Archive Trap, Hedron Crab, and Ruin Crab are used to mill cards from their library, while cards like Drown in the Loch and Surgical Extraction disrupt their strategy. The goal is to mill the opponent's library as quickly as possible, making it difficult for them to draw into their win conditions. The deck also includes some control elements like Fatal Push and Tasha's Hideous Laughter to deal with threats.

The Boros Aggro deck focuses on a fast-paced and aggressive strategy, utilizing low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It combines creature aggression with direct damage spells to apply pressure early in the game and maintain momentum throughout. The deck also includes powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer to generate value and maintain threats on the board. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swift and relentless assault while maintaining card advantage and board presence.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the interaction between Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief, while also using cards like Malevolent Rumble, Glaring Fleshraker, and Devourer of Destiny to control the board and disrupt your opponent's strategy. The deck aims to generate mana quickly with cards like Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to cast powerful threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Walking Ballista. Additionally, Ancient Stirrings helps to find key combo pieces while Ugin's Labyrinth provides protection. The deck combines combo potential with disruptive elements to create a powerful and versatile strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of creatures and spells to manipulate the graveyard and ultimately cast Living End, a powerful sorcery that returns all creatures from the graveyard to the battlefield. By cycling cards like Street Wraith and Endurance, the deck can quickly fill the graveyard with creatures to set up a game-winning Living End. Additionally, cards like Colossal Skyturtle and Archon of Cruelty provide additional value when they enter the battlefield from Living End. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a sudden influx of creatures and establish board dominance.

This UW Control deck focuses on utilizing counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It also includes cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and Orim's Chant to limit the opponent's options and generate advantage. The deck includes ways to tutor for key spells, such as Consult the Star Charts and Meticulous Archive. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption and tempo advantage. The inclusion of Solitude and Supreme Verdict offers efficient removal options to deal with threats on the board.

The deck focuses on generating mana quickly through rituals and medallions to cast powerful storm spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Past in Flames while also using Wish cards to tutor for key combo pieces. It includes burn and draw spells to maintain momentum and board presence, while also utilizing unique cards like Flame of Anor and Wrenn's Resolve to control the game. The deck aims to assemble the combo pieces necessary to create a massive storm count and finish off the opponent in one explosive turn.

The main strategy of this deck is to control the game through counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. By using cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Teferi, Time Raveler, the deck aims to keep the opponent's threats in check while setting up its own win conditions. The deck also utilizes cards like Terminus and Solitude for board control, along with interaction like Force of Negation and Prismatic Ending. The inclusion of Kaheera as a companion adds an additional benefit by giving access to a powerful creature to help close out the game.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while using cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to buff them up and deal damage. The deck also includes removal spells like Thraben Charm and Galvanic Discharge to control the board. The addition of cards like Arena of Glory and Elegant Parlor provide additional utility and synergy with the deck's strategy of overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures and burn spells.

This deck focuses on explosive early game plays using cheap artifacts and creatures to overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to ramp up quickly and generate card advantage with Thoughtcast. Urza's Saga provides versatile options to fetch essential artifacts. Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke help control the board while Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer deal damage efficiently. The deck also includes graveyard hate with Tormod's Crypt and Salvage Titan for recursion. The goal is to maintain aggressive pressure and close out the game swiftly.

The deck focuses on quickly playing artifacts to take advantage of the Affinity mechanic and overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mox Opal help to accelerate mana production, while cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke provide control and disruption. Urza's Saga is a key card for generating value and finding important artifacts, while cards like Kappa Cannoneer and Claws of Gix provide additional removal options. The deck aims to quickly establish a board presence and pressure the opponent before they can stabilize.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on a fast and aggressive playstyle, using efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to push through damage and control the board. Additionally, cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional support and buff to the creatures. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Blood Moon to hinder opponent's mana base. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to apply pressure early and maintain it to secure a quick victory.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures, disruptive spells, and powerful removal to control the game and pressure the opponent into making mistakes. It utilizes a mixture of aggressive threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, along with disruptive cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and mainboard removal spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By applying pressure while disrupting the opponent's game plan, this deck aims to maintain control of the game and secure a victory through efficient tactics and powerful creatures.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Amulet of Vigor and Primeval Titan combo to ramp up mana and search for key lands like Urza's Saga and Lotus Field. By using cards like Arboreal Grazer and Gruul Turf, the deck aims to generate explosive mana acceleration and eventually win the game through powerful cards like Scapeshift. The key strategy revolves around efficiently utilizing land drops and leveraging the synergies between various land cards to set up powerful board states and overwhelm the opponent with big threats.
